title: leontodon taraxacum var. salinus
intro: Leontodon taraxacum var. salinus, commonly known as the salt dandelion or sea hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to coastal areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon taraxacum var. salinus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
